title: 'arach #0732
definition:
1) to wander, journey, go, keep company with
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to journey, go
        1a2) (part.)
             1a2a) wandering, wayfarer, journeying
        1a3) (subst.)
             1a3a) wanderer, wayfarer, traveller
